revision.text:

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[室町幕府]]の[[職制]]（[[役職]]）に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:むろまちはくふのしよくせい}} [[カテゴリ:室町幕府|しよくせい]] ==Local Content== {{citation needed|むろまちはくふのしよくせい}} {{translated page|ja|Category:室町幕府の職制|comment=category history here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:室町幕府の職制|version=66485326}} [[ja:Category:室町幕府の職制]] [[ko:Category:무로마치 막부의 직제]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:室町幕府奉公衆]] [[zh:Category:室町幕府官制]] {{wikidata link|Q9625463}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Muromachi Shogunate]] [[Category:Shogunate Administrative System]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
